mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary(diaryno, memberno, title, content, password, rdate, file1, file1saved, thumb1, size1, risk_flag) VALUES(diary_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{password}, SYSDATE, #{file1}, #{file1saved}, #{thumb1}, #{size1}, #{risk_flag})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM diary WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY rdate DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
